creator: ben@lavery-griffiths.com
text:
Created attachment 183112
svn diff to upgrade to 0.21

gohugo has been updated to 0.21 (https://github.com/spf13/hugo/releases/tag/v0.21)

The attached svn diff brings this port up from 0.19 to 0.21

This supersedes:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=219071

Tested against 10.3-RELEASE and 11.0-RELEASE, no issues building manually/poudriere. Poudriere logs attached.


root@freebsd-11:~/gohugo # portlint -AC
looks fine.
